name: Focus utilities
description: Opt-in focus-ring utility. The .focusable class draws the token-driven focus outline on :focus / :focus-within / :focus-visible.

families.name: focusable
families.description: Draws the design-system focus ring (outline width, offset and color from the focus tokens) when the element or a descendant is focused.
guidance: Never remove the focus ring without providing an equally visible replacement; keyboard users rely on it.
Interactive zebkit components already manage their own focus visibility — reach for .focusable on custom interactive elements.
families.a11y: This IS the accessible focus indicator; the outline width/offset/color are token-bound so they respond to the contrast and spacing dials.
